name: NaturalNutrientsRequest
description: Request body for the natural language nutrients endpoint.

query.description: Plain-text description of the food(s) to analyze.
query.example: 1 cup mashed potatoes and 2 tbsp gravy

num_servings.description: Multiplier applied to the parsed serving quantities.

aggregate.description: When set, aggregates all foods into a single named result.

line_delimited.description: Treat each newline in the query as a separate food.

use_raw_foods.description: Prefer raw (uncooked) USDA foods when resolving the query.

include_subrecipe.description: Include sub-recipe ingredient breakdowns where available.

timezone.description: IANA timezone used for consumed_at calculations.

use_branded_foods.description: Allow branded foods to satisfy the query.

locale.description: Locale code used to localize results.
